---
title: "About"
#image: blaubar.png
about:
  image-width: 10em
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/mastoffel
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}} Google scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=58uLFHoAAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mastoffel/
---

Hi, I'm Martin. At heart, I'm curious about nature and technology and everything in between. Until recently, I was a researcher working on evolutionary genetics and biostatistics at the University of Edinburgh, and a PIBBSS fellow working on AI alignment. Now, I'm a Research Data Scientist at the Alan Turing Institute, combining a passion for building things and tackling new challenges across disciplines.
